main.description: Remove a registered device, its key packages, and leave all conversations the device was a member of

deviceId.description: Device ID to remove (must be owned by authenticated user)

deleted.description: True if device was successfully removed

keyPackagesDeleted.description: Number of key packages deleted with the device

conversationsLeft.description: Number of conversations the device was removed from

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: User does not own this device or is not authenticated
